# M8R AI market context fixtures

The unit suite builds compact in-memory non-network fixtures for complete TWSE, partial TWSE/TPEx, TAIFEX future/option, local-only, blocked, M8-core failure, mixed currentness, stale/EOD/live-ish, missing-context, and raw-key contamination cases. This directory is reserved for reviewed JSON fixture promotion when a future task requires stored golden artifacts.
